title: Phase A: add Vitest+jsdom smoke net rendering all 15 lessons on the current monolith
action: Establish the regression safety net BEFORE any code is moved (per D3). Steps: (1) Add Vitest + jsdom + @testing-library/react + @testing-library/dom as devDependencies (vitest ^2 — pin the major so npx does not fetch v3) and an npm 'test' script running `vitest run`. After editing package.json, run `npm install` to materialize the devDeps and update package-lock.json (a cold clone has no node_modules). (2) Configure the jsdom test env in vite.config.js under a `test` block: `import { defineConfig } from "vite"` (proven to work with a `test` block), set environment 'jsdom', globals true, setupFiles ['src/test/setup.js'], and include ['src/**/*.test.jsx'] so the disposable .spikes/ test is NOT collected. (3) In src/test/setup.js provide the jsdom stubs the app requires (PROVEN necessary by the .spikes/modularize-app spike): `window.scrollTo` no-op, a global `ResizeObserver` class stub (App.jsx:167 NumberLine), and a `window.matchMedia` stub. (4) Write src/__tests__/lessons.smoke.test.jsx that imports App from '../App.jsx', renders <App/> once, collects lesson-nav buttons (textContent matches /Bài\s*\d+/, de-duped), asserts there are >=15, then clicks through EVERY lesson button. This is a STRONG net (not a vacuous one): after each click, count rendered stations via container.querySelectorAll('section[id]') and assert each lesson renders >=3 stations AND the total across all 15 lessons is >=100 (spike measured 150). This makes a dropped lesson or station in Phases D/E fail the test. Wrap clicks so no act(...) warning is emitted (fireEvent inside act, or React's act). Do NOT modify src/App.jsx at all — the spike proved nav-driven rendering needs no LESSONS export. Do NOT move, rename, or restructure any code (Phases B-F). The smoke test MUST pass against the current unmodified monolith and `npm run build` MUST stay clean.

truths: npx vitest run renders all 15 lessons green against the current (un-split) App.jsx
the net is strong: each lesson renders >=3 stations and total stations across 15 lessons >=100 (so a dropped lesson/station in later phases fails)
vitest include excludes .spikes so only src tests run

artifacts.substantive: renders <App/>, clicks all >=15 lesson nav buttons, asserts no throw + content present; no TODO stubs, no skipped tests
stubs window.scrollTo, global ResizeObserver, window.matchMedia for jsdom (proven required by spike)
adds vitest ^2, jsdom, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/dom devDeps and a `test` script

key_links: vite.config.js test block sets environment jsdom + setupFiles src/test/setup.js
the smoke test imports the real App from src/App.jsx
prohibitions: Do NOT modify src/App.jsx in any way (no LESSONS export needed — spike proved nav-driven render works)
Do NOT move, rename, extract, or restructure any component/util/data (Phases B-F only)
Do NOT change any lesson content (D2)

verify: npx vitest run && npm run build

trace.verify_output: npx vitest run: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 1 passed (1) in 732ms, no act warnings. npm run build: 1500 modules transformed, built in 1.67s, bundle dist/assets/index-p-d6Q-tE.js 296.26 kB (byte-identical hash to pre-change baseline -> App.jsx untouched, behavior preserved).
